next_recommended_action: The requested single A-line cycle for gcb-src-004 is complete through draft2_done. If the board wants to continue, the next proper owner is B01 for human_review_ready preparation.
notes: User comment on June 6, 2026 requested starting translation work for gcb-src-007 as a test translation and explicitly warned against over-progressing the workflow.
Director explicitly approved the first A01 gate for this single document only and delegated execution to A00 rather than performing translation directly.
Review of delegated work confirmed that no reference split, draft1, or draft2 outputs were created for gcb-src-007 in this test batch.

Board comment on June 6, 2026 requested a complete single translation cycle up to draft2_done for gcb-src-004, so the director delegated the document to A00 as OLDA-15 with explicit approval to pass the initial intake gate for this one document.

A later board comment flagged that A00 appeared to process the work personally instead of routing through child agents. The director confirmed that the A00 completion log explicitly claimed the manager executed the full A-line chain, then opened OLDA-17 to separate process correction from the already-produced translation artifacts.
OLDA-17 completed with a corrective process log and an A00 role-rule update: future single-document or full-cycle exceptions still require child delegation, not manager self-production.
